title: melicope obtusifolia subsp. gigas
intro: Melicope obtusifolia subsp. gigas is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the yellow ginger. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Melicope obtusifolia subsp. gigas can be used in teas, infusions, and poultices, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
